name: surgical-discipline
description: Verify /cook only changes files the user asked about — no drive-by refactors, no unrelated edits, no comment/formatting improvements.
prompt: /cook Fix the bug in login() where the return value is undefined when the password hash comparison fails. Only touch this function.
rationale: Surgical Changes is a CLAUDE.md core rule. Regression here = drift in /cook's core promise. Strictest single-file-scope eval in the suite.
